title: Ender eye sword
description: This mod adds simple and usefull sword - better than netherite sword and more needed in end-game stage.
body:
# About
(main description of mod)


<details>
<summary>Show me this!</summary>

This mod introduces a **simple 3D Ender Eye sword**, an extremely powerful weapon crafted from ~~rare~~ materials tied to the Nether-End dimensions. Acquiring it is challenging and demands real effort, but once obtained, the blade grants overwhelming strength and the ability to reclaim control over your world from anything that threatens it.

</details>



# Features
Ender-eye sword with 9 damage, 2131 durability. The powerful weapon to change world rules into your rules. RMB ability with v1.1+!


<details>
<summary>Current status</summary>

Hey! Just letting you know the project isn’t abandoned. I’m still working on it, just slower than planned. Right now I’m trying to get the Fabric 1.21 port running and also preparing EES v1.2.1 for Fabric. The current Fabric version (1.1.9) might end up being the last one for this loader because of a Fabric-side bug that breaks enchantment books. I’ll continue once the bug get fixed.
Small update (Dec 13, 2025): I’ve started working on an English translation for the mod. It’s not finished yet, but it’s in progress.
Thanks for waiting.

</details>
